Name: LAVA Electric Vacuum Pump (Easy Pump)
Short description: Electric hand pump for vacuum sealing without a vacuum sealer. Ideal for G-Line glass containers and Flex jar sealer — rechargeable, compact, auto shut-off.
Description:
The LAVA Easy Pump vacuum-seals G-Line glass containers, vacuum lids and the Flex jar sealer at the push of a button.

  • Material: ABS plastic and BPA-free silicone
  • Dimensions: 43 × 43 × 150 mm
  • Weight: 180 g
  • Rechargeable lithium-ion — USB-C cable included
  • Auto shut-off at maximum vacuum
